name: Google Contacts pull
description: Read-only Google Contacts ingestion through the connection broker (issue #304): people land in the staging band as core.party rows — identifier-overlap dedup and merge candidates ride the spine's review, not blind inserts.
prompt: Every six hours, pull my Google Contacts into the vault as people. Follow the sync token incrementally after the first full walk. Read-only — never modify contacts upstream. Stage everything for my review; existing people dedupe by email and phone.

vault.why: Stages Google Contacts into the vault's review band as people and tracks the incremental syncToken cursor on the pull.gcontacts connection.
